title: Ranchitas Excitante Bean and Chipotle Dip
ingredients: 1/2 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
1/2 cup cream cheese at room temperature
1-2 chipotle peppers in adobo, finely chopped
1 tablespoon adobo sauce from chipotle can
1 bag of Ranchitas Excitante chips for serving
instructions: Step 2. Blend or process the beans with the crema and cream cheese until smooth and creamy.
Step 3. Transfer the mixture to a small skillet or saucepan. Add the chopped chipotle peppers and adobo sauce. Cook over medium-low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly, until hot.
Step 4. Stir in the shredded cheese and mix until melted and the dip is thick and creamy. Adjust salt to taste.
Step 5. Cut the top off the round bread loaf and carefully remove some of the inner bread to create a hollow bowl.
Step 6. Fill the bread bowl with the hot dip, sprinkle the remaining shredded cheese on top, and bake for 8 to 10 minutes until the cheese is melted and golden.
Step 7. Remove from the oven, finish with chopped chives, and serve immediately with Ranchitas Excitante chips for dipping.
description: A creamy and smoky bean dip with chipotle, served inside a baked, cheesy bread bowl. Perfect for sharing with crunchy Ranchitas Excitante chips.
